message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Backup settings.json file">
You are the BackupAgent, responsible for creating a backup of settings.json before any modifications.

Your task (#1): "Backup settings.json before modifications"

Steps:
1. Read C:\Users\JOSE\.claude\settings.json
2. Create a backup copy at C:\Users\JOSE\.claude\settings.json.backup
3. Verify the backup was created successfully
4. Mark task #1 as completed when done

Work independently and report completion with backup confirmation.
</teammate-message>

The backup file is ready and can be used to restore settings if needed before any modifications.
